name: Gibson Bay Golf Garage
about: Gibson Bay Golf Garage is a golf training facility and indoor simulator venue located in Richmond, KY. The venue offers a comprehensive range of golf services, including private lessons, group instruction, junior programs, and club fitting. It utilizes state-of-the-art UNEEKOR simulator technology to provide an indoor golfing experience with realistic course simulations and shot analysis. The facility is staffed by a team of PGA professionals with extensive experience dedicated to helping golfers of all skill levels improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to cutting-edge UNEEKOR simulator technology for realistic indoor play
Personalized instruction from experienced PGA professionals
Comprehensive training options including private lessons, group classes, and golf fitness
Junior-focused programs and tours for young golfers
Ability to play on virtual renditions of world-famous golf courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator technology provider for all bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted. BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for a full 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Gibson Bay Golf Garage offers specific junior programs, junior tours, and 'College & Beyond' programs, indicating a strong focus on youth and family-friendly golf.
